prestazioni: Lotus Twin-Cam (LTC) 1.6L (engine code: 225E) forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (89.5mm bore, 8.0:1 compression ratio) and Cunningham conrods, paired with a Cosworth BD-series billet crankshaft (72.75mm stroke) for a 1.8L stroker build, retaining the original Lotus cylinder head with port-matched intake/exhaust runners and oversized Ferrea 6000-series valves (43.5mm intake, 36.5mm exhaust) with titanium retainers and dual valve springs

Custom 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering, featuring 1.75" primary tubes merging into a 2.5" collector, paired with a Milltek Sport 2.5" backbox with 304-grade stainless steel construction and a 3" rolled-edge tip, tuned for a 300Hz scavenging pulse at 6,500 RPM

Weber 45 DCOE sidedraft carburetion conversion with Jenvey Dynamics 45mm throttle bodies (ITB setup), featuring custom velocity stacks by Jenvey and a bespoke fuel rail by Titan Motorsport, calibrated with a Facet Silver Top fuel pump (110 LPH) and adjustable fuel pressure regulator (3.5-5.5 psi range), mated to a custom ignition system with a Lumenition Optronic breakerless distributor and NGK B9EGV spark plugs gapped at 0.024"
estetica: Full Lotus Cortina Mk1-specific widebody conversion using a Rare Spares fiberglass kit (part #RS-LCWB-01), extending front and rear fenders by 2.5" with integrated rivet-style fasteners, paired with a custom front splitter by Kamei (originally designed for the Mk1 Escort RS1600) modified to fit the Cortina’s chassis

OEM+ Lotus Cortina Mk1 rear ducktail spoiler in carbon fiber by Fibreflite (part #FF-LC-001), mounted on custom aluminum brackets to clear the original bootlid hinges, with a 3M 2080 Series Gloss Black vinyl wrap on the spoiler and rear valence for contrast against the original Lotus Sherwood Green paint (code: 207)

Period-correct Minilite 13x6" magnesium wheels (replica by Image Wheels, part #IW-MINI-136) with 4.5" backspacing, shod in Avon CR6ZZ tires (185/60R13 front, 205/60R13 rear), paired with Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers (part #120-10670) and 10.8" vented rotors on custom billet aluminum hats, with Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines
